name: Metaswarm Execution Loop - Single Work Unit
description: 4-phase execution cycle for a single work unit with TDD, quality gates, and adversarial review

workUnit.title: Implement JWT token generation and validation
definitionOfDone: JWT tokens generated with RS256 signing
Token validation middleware rejects expired tokens

phases: implement (TDD: write tests first, watch fail, implement)
validate (independent tsc + eslint + vitest, never trust subagent)
adversarial-review (fresh reviewer, binary PASS/FAIL with evidence)
commit (only after PASS, within declared file scope)
